usecases.name: Daily Reddit Digest
usecases.description: Automated daily summaries of top Reddit threads across chosen subreddits
usecases.why_it_matters: Pattern for any feed-to-brief pipeline — replace Reddit with internal forums or Slack channels

usecases.name: Daily YouTube Digest
usecases.description: Summarizes new videos from subscribed channels with key takeaways
usecases.why_it_matters: Content monitoring at scale — same pattern works for competitor video tracking

usecases.name: X Account Analysis
usecases.description: Deep analysis of any X/Twitter account — posting patterns, engagement, topics
usecases.why_it_matters: Competitive intelligence and influencer vetting without expensive SaaS tools

usecases.name: Multi-Source Tech News Digest
usecases.description: Aggregates and deduplicates tech news from 10+ sources into a single brief
usecases.why_it_matters: The core pattern behind Smart Intel itself — proves the research agent model

usecases.name: X/Twitter Automation
usecases.description: Scheduled posting, engagement tracking, and reply management on X
usecases.why_it_matters: Social presence automation — lets one person run a brand account that looks like a team

usecases.name: Goal-Driven Autonomous Tasks
usecases.description: Set a high-level goal and let the agent break it into steps and execute autonomously
usecases.why_it_matters: The agentic loop pattern — foundational for any complex multi-step workflow

usecases.name: YouTube Content Pipeline
usecases.description: End-to-end pipeline: research → script → thumbnail → upload → community post
usecases.why_it_matters: Full content factory pattern — shows agent orchestration across creative + technical tools

usecases.name: Multi-Agent Content Factory
usecases.description: Multiple specialized agents (writer, editor, designer, publisher) collaborating on content
usecases.why_it_matters: Multi-agent architecture in production — the pattern enterprises want for document workflows

usecases.name: Autonomous Game Dev Pipeline
usecases.description: Agent writes game code, tests it, iterates on bugs, and deploys playable builds
usecases.why_it_matters: Proves autonomous coding loops work for creative software — not just CRUD apps

usecases.name: Podcast Production Pipeline
usecases.description: Research guests, generate questions, transcribe episodes, create show notes and clips
usecases.why_it_matters: Media production automation — each step is a reusable agent pattern

usecases.name: n8n Workflow Orchestration
usecases.description: OpenClaw as the brain controlling n8n workflows — triggering, monitoring, and fixing automations
usecases.why_it_matters: Bridges AI agents with existing automation infra — n8n handles integrations, agent handles decisions

usecases.name: Self-Healing Home Server
usecases.description: Agent monitors server health, detects failures, and automatically applies fixes
usecases.why_it_matters: Self-healing infrastructure pattern — directly applicable to production SRE workflows

usecases.name: Autonomous Project Management
usecases.description: Agent manages project boards, assigns tasks, tracks deadlines, sends status updates
usecases.why_it_matters: PM automation frees architects from status-tracking overhead

usecases.name: Multi-Channel AI Customer Service
usecases.description: Single agent handling customer queries across email, chat, and social simultaneously
usecases.why_it_matters: Multi-channel support without per-channel bot configs — one agent, many interfaces

usecases.name: Phone-Based Personal Assistant
usecases.description: Voice-controlled assistant via phone — manages calendar, sends messages, looks things up
usecases.why_it_matters: Mobile-first agent UX — the interface most people actually want

usecases.name: Inbox De-clutter
usecases.description: Agent triages email inbox — archives noise, flags important, drafts replies for review
usecases.why_it_matters: Email is still the #1 time sink — automated triage saves hours per week

usecases.name: Personal CRM
usecases.description: Tracks contacts, follow-ups, meeting notes, and relationship history automatically
usecases.why_it_matters: Relationship management without SaaS fees — agent updates the CRM from your conversations

usecases.name: Health & Symptom Tracker
usecases.description: Log symptoms via chat, get trend analysis, prep summaries for doctor visits
usecases.why_it_matters: Personal health data pipeline — same pattern applies to any longitudinal tracking

usecases.name: Multi-Channel Personal Assistant
usecases.description: Same agent accessible via Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, and web — unified context
usecases.why_it_matters: Channel-agnostic agent design — the architecture pattern every enterprise needs

usecases.name: Project State Management
usecases.description: Agent maintains project context across sessions — decisions, blockers, progress
usecases.why_it_matters: Persistent state for agents is the unsolved problem — this shows a working approach

usecases.name: Dynamic Dashboard
usecases.description: Agent generates and updates dashboards based on natural language requests
usecases.why_it_matters: Self-service BI without dashboard tools — agent queries data and builds the viz

usecases.name: Todoist Task Manager
usecases.description: Agent syncs with Todoist — creates tasks from conversations, manages priorities, sends reminders
usecases.why_it_matters: Task management integration pattern — works with any task API

usecases.name: Family Calendar & Household Assistant
usecases.description: Manages family schedules, chore assignments, grocery lists, and school events
usecases.why_it_matters: Multi-user agent with role-based context — the household is a mini-enterprise

usecases.name: Multi-Agent Specialized Team
usecases.description: Team of agents with distinct roles — architect, coder, reviewer, deployer
usecases.why_it_matters: The multi-agent team pattern that every enterprise AI strategy deck talks about — actually built

usecases.name: Desktop Cowork
usecases.description: Agent watches your screen and proactively offers help, context, and suggestions
usecases.why_it_matters: Ambient computing pattern — agent as a pair programmer who never sleeps

usecases.name: Custom Morning Brief
usecases.description: Personalized morning briefing: weather, calendar, news, tasks, and market updates
usecases.why_it_matters: The daily brief is the killer app for personal agents — proves immediate, tangible value

usecases.name: Automated Meeting Notes & Action Items
usecases.description: Joins meetings, transcribes, extracts action items, and distributes summaries
usecases.why_it_matters: Meeting overhead is the #1 enterprise time waste — automated notes change the ROI math

usecases.name: Habit Tracker & Accountability Coach
usecases.description: Tracks daily habits, sends reminders, provides streak data and motivational nudges
usecases.why_it_matters: Behavioral loop pattern — agent as a persistent, personalized nudge engine

usecases.name: Second Brain
usecases.description: Agent as a knowledge management system — captures, links, and retrieves information contextually
usecases.why_it_matters: RAG + personal context = the knowledge worker productivity multiplier

usecases.name: Event Guest Confirmation
usecases.description: Manages RSVPs, sends reminders, handles dietary preferences and logistics
usecases.why_it_matters: Event management automation — multi-step communication workflow with state tracking

usecases.name: Phone Call Notifications
usecases.description: Agent screens calls, provides context about callers, and sends smart notifications
usecases.why_it_matters: Call screening as an agent skill — bridges telephony and AI

usecases.name: Local CRM Framework
usecases.description: Fully local CRM that runs on your machine — no cloud dependency, full data ownership
usecases.why_it_matters: Data sovereignty for small businesses — CRM without SaaS lock-in

usecases.name: AI Earnings Tracker
usecases.description: Tracks AI company earnings, extracts key metrics, and generates investment briefs
usecases.why_it_matters: Financial intelligence automation — same pattern for any sector earnings analysis

usecases.name: Personal Knowledge Base (RAG)
usecases.description: RAG-powered knowledge base that indexes your documents and answers questions with citations
usecases.why_it_matters: The RAG pattern made personal — enterprise search for individuals

usecases.name: Market Research & Product Factory
usecases.description: End-to-end market research: competitor analysis, user interviews synthesis, product briefs
usecases.why_it_matters: Research-to-decision pipeline — the pattern PMs and strategists need

usecases.name: Pre-Build Idea Validator
usecases.description: Validates product ideas before building: market size, competitors, technical feasibility
usecases.why_it_matters: Due diligence automation — saves weeks of manual research per idea

usecases.name: Semantic Memory Search
usecases.description: Vector-based memory that finds relevant past conversations and documents by meaning
usecases.why_it_matters: Semantic search is the foundation of agent memory — this makes it practical

usecases.name: arXiv Paper Reader
usecases.description: Monitors arXiv categories, summarizes new papers, and flags relevant ones for deep reading
usecases.why_it_matters: Research monitoring at scale — stay current without reading 50 papers a week

usecases.name: LaTeX Paper Writing
usecases.description: Agent writes and compiles LaTeX papers — handles bibliography, figures, and formatting
usecases.why_it_matters: Academic writing automation — from outline to submission-ready PDF

usecases.name: Polymarket Autopilot
usecases.description: Monitors prediction markets, analyzes probabilities, and suggests or executes trades
usecases.why_it_matters: Autonomous trading agent pattern — high-stakes decision-making with real money

usecases.name: Email Cleanup (10K Day 1)
usecases.description: Cleaned 10,000 emails on day one — auto-archive, unsubscribe, categorize at scale
usecases.why_it_matters: Proves agent throughput — 10K actions in a session is enterprise-grade batch processing

usecases.name: Site Rebuild via Telegram
usecases.description: Rebuilt entire website by chatting with agent on Telegram while watching Netflix
usecases.why_it_matters: Mobile-first development — the phone becomes the IDE for agent-driven coding

usecases.name: Raspberry Pi + Cloudflare Deployment
usecases.description: Full agent runtime on a Raspberry Pi with Cloudflare tunnel for public access
usecases.why_it_matters: Edge AI deployment on $35 hardware — proves agents dont need cloud instances

usecases.name: Meal Planning System in Notion
usecases.description: Agent manages weekly meal plans, generates shopping lists, and syncs to Notion
usecases.why_it_matters: Lifestyle automation with real tool integration — not a toy demo

usecases.name: Solo Founder 4-Agent Team
usecases.description: One founder running strategy, dev, marketing, and business agents as virtual team
usecases.why_it_matters: The solo-founder-as-CEO pattern — agents as department heads, human as strategist

usecases.name: Garmin + Obsidian + GitHub Integration
usecases.description: Syncs Garmin fitness data to Obsidian notes and GitHub for health tracking
usecases.why_it_matters: Cross-platform data pipeline — agent as the universal API bridge

usecases.name: Railway Deployment Debugging via Voice
usecases.description: Debugged Railway deployment by voice while walking the dog
usecases.why_it_matters: Voice-first DevOps — proves agents work in zero-screen contexts

usecases.name: Swift macOS Menu Bar App
usecases.description: Native macOS menu bar app for quick OpenClaw access — built with Swift
usecases.why_it_matters: Native OS integration — agent becomes a first-class desktop citizen

usecases.name: 15+ Agent Army Across 3 Machines
usecases.description: Fleet of 15+ specialized agents distributed across 3 machines, coordinated centrally
usecases.why_it_matters: Distributed agent orchestration — the architecture pattern for scaling agent workloads

usecases.name: Idea-to-Decision Pipeline with Overnight Cron
usecases.description: Submit ideas before bed, wake up to validated research with go/no-go recommendations
usecases.why_it_matters: Async agent work — overnight batch processing turns sleeping hours into productive ones

usecases.name: Google Ads Optimization
usecases.description: Agent monitors Google Ads campaigns, adjusts bids, pauses underperformers, generates reports
usecases.why_it_matters: PPC automation with AI judgment — not just rules, actual contextual optimization

usecases.name: Jira/GA4/GSC Skills
usecases.description: Custom skills for Jira ticket management, Google Analytics 4, and Google Search Console
usecases.why_it_matters: Enterprise tool integration via skills — the plugin architecture that makes agents useful at work

usecases.name: SDK Docs Visual Refresh
usecases.description: Agent redesigned SDK documentation site — updated styling, fixed navigation, improved UX
usecases.why_it_matters: Documentation maintenance by agent — the most neglected dev task, now automated

usecases.name: AI Teaching Assistant
usecases.description: Automated grading, lesson plan generation, student progress tracking, and parent communication
usecases.why_it_matters: Education is ripe for agent automation — teachers spend 50% of time on admin, not teaching

usecases.name: Student Tutoring Agent
usecases.description: Voice-based Q&A tutoring agent that adapts to student level and learning style
usecases.why_it_matters: Personalized education at scale — one agent per student, available 24/7

usecases.name: Course Content Auto-Updater
usecases.description: Monitors industry changes and automatically updates course materials to stay current
usecases.why_it_matters: Content freshness automation — courses go stale fast, agents keep them current

usecases.name: Patient Appointment Scheduling
usecases.description: EHR-integrated scheduling with no-show prediction and automated reminders
usecases.why_it_matters: Healthcare scheduling is a $150B problem — AI reduces no-shows by 30-40%

usecases.name: Digital Patient Intake
usecases.description: WhatsApp-based patient intake forms with automatic EHR population
usecases.why_it_matters: Patient experience meets automation — intake on the channel patients already use

usecases.name: AI Care Coordinator
usecases.description: Coordinates between specialists, manages referrals, tracks treatment plans
usecases.why_it_matters: Care coordination failures cost lives — agent ensures nothing falls through cracks

usecases.name: Automated Trading System
usecases.description: Sentiment analysis + technical indicators driving automated buy/sell decisions
usecases.why_it_matters: Autonomous financial agents — the compliance and risk implications architects must understand

usecases.name: Quant Investment Workflow
usecases.description: Backtesting strategies, portfolio optimization, and risk analysis via agent pipeline
usecases.why_it_matters: Quant workflows democratized — what hedge funds build internally, now accessible

usecases.name: Technical SEO Auditor
usecases.description: Crawls sites, identifies SEO issues, generates fix recommendations with priority scoring
usecases.why_it_matters: SEO audits cost $5K+ from agencies — agent does it continuously for free

usecases.name: Programmatic SEO Pipeline
usecases.description: Generates hundreds of SEO-optimized pages from templates and data sources
usecases.why_it_matters: Programmatic SEO at scale — the growth hack that built Zapier and Canva landing pages

usecases.name: Link Building Automation
usecases.description: Finds link opportunities, drafts outreach emails, tracks responses and placements
usecases.why_it_matters: Link building is 80% research and outreach — perfect for agent automation

usecases.name: Social Media Scheduler
usecases.description: Creates, schedules, and cross-posts content across multiple social platforms
usecases.why_it_matters: Buffer/Hootsuite alternative with AI content generation built in

usecases.name: Content Repurposing Engine
usecases.description: Takes one piece of content and transforms it into 10+ formats: threads, reels scripts, blog posts, newsletters
usecases.why_it_matters: Content multiplication — the 1-to-many pattern every content team needs

usecases.name: Legal Document Review
usecases.description: Clause extraction, version diffing, risk flagging, and compliance checking for contracts
usecases.why_it_matters: Legal review costs $500+/hour — agent handles first-pass review at near-zero marginal cost

usecases.name: Compliance Monitoring
usecases.description: Monitors regulatory changes, maps them to internal policies, flags required updates
usecases.why_it_matters: Compliance drift is expensive — continuous monitoring beats annual audits

usecases.name: Home Assistant Voice Control
usecases.description: Natural language control of Home Assistant devices — lights, thermostat, locks, cameras
usecases.why_it_matters: Voice + smart home without Alexa/Google lock-in — fully private, fully customizable

usecases.name: Scene Automation
usecases.description: Context-aware home scenes — movie mode, bedtime, work-from-home, guest mode
usecases.why_it_matters: Contextual automation beyond simple schedules — agent understands intent

usecases.name: Security Monitor
usecases.description: AI-powered camera monitoring with person detection, alerts, and event logging
usecases.why_it_matters: Computer vision + agent = smart security without monthly subscriptions

usecases.name: Energy Optimization
usecases.description: Monitors energy usage, optimizes HVAC schedules, tracks solar production, reduces bills
usecases.why_it_matters: Energy management is a climate and cost problem — agents optimize continuously

usecases.name: PicoClaw (Pi Zero)
usecases.description: Minimal agent runtime on Raspberry Pi Zero — ultra-low-power always-on assistant
usecases.why_it_matters: Edge AI at the extreme — proves agents run on $15 hardware with 512MB RAM

usecases.name: LinkedIn Outreach
usecases.description: Automated LinkedIn connection requests, follow-ups, and engagement tracking
usecases.why_it_matters: Sales outreach automation — the most requested enterprise agent use case

usecases.name: Airbnb Guest Management
usecases.description: Automated guest communication, check-in instructions, review responses, and pricing
usecases.why_it_matters: Property management automation — one agent replaces a property manager for small hosts

usecases.name: Invoice Automation
usecases.description: Generates, sends, and tracks invoices — chases overdue payments automatically
usecases.why_it_matters: Cash flow automation for freelancers and small businesses — money in faster

usecases.name: Raspberry Pi AI Hub
usecases.description: Central AI hub on Raspberry Pi coordinating IoT devices, running local models
usecases.why_it_matters: Edge computing hub pattern — local inference, global coordination

usecases.name: Overnight Coding Sessions
usecases.description: Describe features via chat before bed, wake up to pull requests ready for review
usecases.why_it_matters: Double development velocity — ship features while you sleep
